title: lolium perenne var. vulgare
intro: Lolium perenne var. vulgare, also known as common ryegrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lolium perenne var. vulgare include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and support respiratory health. Lolium perenne var. vulgare can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
